title: ヒヤシンスSの後に・勝者の影に

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I did great in the Hyacinth Stakes! But... while I
thought I could run and simp for my Umas without
bothering them, the ones who lost are crying...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can't be a spectator if I'm running, and if
someone is going to win a race, that means others
have to lose. It took me too long to realize this,
but I have to set my resolve!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll become better to repay those Umas whose
dreams were broken! I'll show them how strong I
am in my next race, the NHK Mile Cup! I can't
wait!
